name: Chutney Cheese Toasts
recipeIngredient: 4 Pieces toast, one side buttered and spread with fruit chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pan. Add the next two ingredients and sauté until the onion is tender and the bacon is golden.
2. Drain well. Arrange tomato over toast, top with bacon and onion and a slice of cheese.
3. Place under hot grill until the cheese has melted and becomes golden brown. Serve hot.
